svg.title: Updated antivirus simulation architecture with VirusTotal
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing three layers: interface, engine, and storage, now including VirusTotal as a second detection layer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the CLI work in antivirus.py?')
sendPrompt('What does the GUI dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('How does scan_file decide between local and VT?')
sendPrompt('How does Layer 1 local signature matching work?')
g.text: check hash in signatures.json — offline, instant

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Layer 2 VirusTotal detection work?')
sendPrompt('What does log_event write to the log file?')
sendPrompt('What is vt_cache.json and why is it needed?')
